C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\riscv_emu_cli.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\riscv_emu_cli.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\riscv_emu_cli.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cc.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\riscv_emu_cli.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o riscv_emu_cli.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libriscv_emu_cli.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\riscv_emu_cli.dir\linkLibs.rsp
